items.title: New Hampshire snuffs out trailblazing state-government bitcoin bond effort
items.summary: At its last stage for government approval, the state's executive council rejected the bond project 3-2.

items.title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
items.summary: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

items.title: Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31
items.summary: The soon-to-be former chief legal officer did not announce the details of his next move but said that he would continue working with the Board of Coinbase National Trust Company.

items.title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
items.summary: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.

items.title: Grayscale's CFO exits after 7 years with crypto asset manager
items.summary: Edward McGee stepped down after seven years, months after distribution chief John Hoffman left for Ondo Finance.

items.summary: The company's post-trained GLM 5.2 preview pairs a cheaper open-source base with a frontier advisor—and it's already live in production.

items.title: With SEC fight over, Coinbase's top legal exec Grewal moves on, and others reassigned
items.summary: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal will depart the exchange, though he'll continue as an adviser, he said Thursday.

items.title: Arbitrum jumps 19% benefitting from Robinhood's $568 million onchain trading frenzy
items.summary: The brokerage's new blockchain is off to a fast start, with memecoin trading boosting activity and revenue flowing back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.
